name: 产品经理形象照（男）
description: 互联网产品经理形象，展现逻辑思维与用户洞察的结合，适合PM、产品总监
style_prompt: Tech product manager portrait, thoughtful and innovative expression, modern casual-professional blend, startup-friendly aesthetic
background_prompt: Clean bright workspace background, subtle whiteboard or product mockup blur, modern tech office vibe
clothing_prompt: Smart casual, fitted oxford shirt or polo in neutral tones, optional light sweater or unstructured blazer, clean and modern
lighting_prompt: Bright natural light simulation, clean and crisp, minimal shadows, fresh and energetic atmosphere
color_tone: Clean tech palette, bright whites and soft blues, natural healthy skin tones

name: 产品经理形象照（女）
description: 互联网女性产品经理形象，展现细腻思维与产品sense，适合PM、产品总监
style_prompt: Female product manager portrait, intelligent and creative expression, approachable tech professional, modern startup aesthetic
background_prompt: Bright modern co-working space blur, soft natural tones, innovative and open environment
clothing_prompt: Contemporary business casual, structured blouse or knit top in soft colors, minimal elegant accessories, polished but approachable
lighting_prompt: Soft bright lighting with gentle warmth, flattering and natural, professional but not stiff
color_tone: Fresh modern palette, soft whites and gentle pastels, warm natural skin tones

name: 技术专家形象照（男）
description: 技术专家形象照，展现极客精神与专业深度，适合架构师、技术负责人、工程师
style_prompt: Tech expert portrait, focused and intelligent expression, engineer aesthetic, modern intellectual vibe, clean and precise
background_prompt: Minimal dark or code-editor-themed backdrop, subtle tech pattern blur, focused and serious environment
clothing_prompt: Clean hoodie or crew-neck sweater in dark neutral, optional casual blazer, glasses optional, understated and smart
lighting_prompt: Cool-toned studio lighting, crisp and precise, slight contrast for definition, intellectual atmosphere
color_tone: Cool tech tones, deep grays and subtle blues, clean and modern color balance

name: 技术专家形象照（女）
description: 女性技术专家形象照，展现代码能力与逻辑思维，适合女工程师、技术负责人
style_prompt: Female tech expert portrait, sharp and confident, modern intellectual style, approachable expertise, clean aesthetic
background_prompt: Minimalist light backdrop with subtle tech elements, clean and organized workspace blur
clothing_prompt: Smart casual top or light sweater in neutral or muted tech colors, clean lines, minimal accessories, modern glasses optional
lighting_prompt: Bright even lighting with slight cool tint, crisp and clear, professional and modern
color_tone: Clean neutral palette with cool undertones, fresh and modern, natural skin with clarity

name: 创业者形象照（男）
description: 科技创业者形象照，展现激情、远见与行动力，适合创始人、联合创始人
style_prompt: Tech founder portrait, dynamic and visionary expression, energetic confidence, startup culture aesthetic, bold and inspiring
background_prompt: Vibrant modern startup office or city view blur, energetic and aspirational environment, warm natural light
clothing_prompt: Casual but sharp, fitted dark t-shirt or henley with unstructured blazer, or clean button-down, modern founder style
lighting_prompt: Warm natural light with dynamic highlights, energetic and inviting, aspirational atmosphere
color_tone: Warm energetic palette, golden hour tones mixed with modern neutrals, vibrant skin tones

name: 创业者形象照（女）
description: 女性科技创业者形象照，展现魄力、创新与领导力，适合女性创始人、CEO
style_prompt: Female tech founder portrait, bold and inspiring, confident visionary, dynamic energy, modern entrepreneurial aesthetic
background_prompt: Bright aspirational workspace or modern loft blur, energetic and innovative setting, warm tones
clothing_prompt: Modern founder style, elegant blouse or fitted top with statement blazer, confident and contemporary, minimal bold accessories
lighting_prompt: Warm dynamic lighting, golden highlights, energetic and empowering atmosphere, magazine-quality
color_tone: Warm modern palette, aspirational golden tones, confident glowing skin, premium startup aesthetic
